rows.description: Computus Henrici Richards Collegii Exoniensis Rectoris, pro seipso et pro Dno Dre Stinton defuncto, a 2do die Novembris 1796, ad eundem diem revolutum 1797.
rows.notes: Description combined from both extractors, based on visual verification. 'Richards' and 'Dre' from gpt-5-mini, and '2do' and 'revolutum' from gemini-flash, as these better match the script. The punctuation after 'Rectoris,' follows gemini-flash's interpretation.
rows.section_header: Computus Henrici Richards Collegii Exoniensis Rectoris, pro seipso et pro Dno Dre Stinton defuncto, a 2do die Novembris 1796, ad eundem diem revolutum 1797.

rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms no period after 'recepta'.
